title: Claude Code conducts A/B tests on core features
content: Please Do Not A/B Test My Workflow I’m a big fan of Claude Code. It’s completely changed how I work, and I’ve been a fan of Anthropic since day one. The founders’ research is something I genuinely admire. Experiencing my own workflow degrade over the past week was frustrating, and this post was written in that frustration. I’ve since revised it to be more accurate and fair in tone. It’s currently #1 on Hacker News, otherwise I’d probably just delete it. Anthropic is running A/B tests on Claude Code that actively degrade my workflow. I wish I could opt out. I don’t think A/B testing is inherently wrong. I don’t think Anthropic is doing this to intentionally degrade anyone’s experience. They’re clearly trying to optimize. But the test design matters, and vastly reducing the effectiveness of a core feature like plan mode is not acceptable test design. I pay $200/month for Claude Code. It’s a professional tool I use to do my job, and I need transparency into how it works and the ability to configure it . What I don’t need is critical functions of the application changing without notice, or being signed up for disruptive testing without my approval. We need to be responsible with how we steer these tools (AI), and we need to be enabled to do so. Transparency is a critical part of that. Configurability is a critical part of that. Every day, engineers complain about regressions in Claude Code. Half the time, the answer is: you’re probably in an A/B test and don’t know it. The Proof [REMOVED] I don’t want to encourage anybody to go down similar paths. I really wanted to understand what was happening, but due to the attention this is gathering on Hacker News, I’ve decided to remove the details. My plans started coming back as terse bullet lists with no context. I asked Claude why it was writing such bad plans. It told me it was following specific system instructions to hard-cap plans at 40 lines, forbid context sections, and “delete prose, not file paths.” This is the opposite of transparency and responsible AI deployment. AI tooling needs more transparency, not less. I need the ability to own my process and guide AI with a human in the loop. More Posts Simplifying Git Worktrees Mar 08, 2026 Steer Agents with Socrates and Meeseeks Feb 22, 2026 Plannotator Jan 02, 2026
title_zh: Claude Code对核心功能进行A/B测试
summary_zh: 一位Claude Code的付费用户对Anthropic公司近期在该产品上进行的A/B测试表达了强烈不满。该用户每月支付200美元使用这款专业AI编程工具，但过去一周其工作流程因未经告知的测试而严重受损。，核心问题在于，Anthropic正在对Claude Code的核心功能（例如“计划模式”）进行A/B测试，测试设计显著降低了该功能的效用。用户发现，AI生成的计划变成了被硬性限制在40行以内、禁止包含上下文章节、并删除了所有描述性文字的简略要点列表。当用户询问Claude时，AI证实它是在遵循特定的系统指令。，用户强调，对于一款用于工作的专业工具，透明度和可配置性至关重要。目前，工程师们每天抱怨的Claude Code功能倒退问题，往往事后才被告知“你可能在不知情的情况下被纳入了A/B测试”。这种在未经用户同意的情况下，擅自改变应用关键功能或让用户参与破坏性测试的做法，是不可接受的。，用户并非反对A/B测试本身，也相信Anthropic的初衷是为了优化产品。但关键在于测试设计的方式。用户呼吁，在引导AI工具发展时，必须秉持负责任的态度，而透明度和允许用户配置、在循环中指导AI的能力是其中的关键部分。当前的做法恰恰与负责任的AI部署背道而驰。AI工具需要更多的透明度，而不是更少。

title: Emacs and Vim in the Age of AI
content: Emacs and Vim in the Age of AI | (think) Emacs and Vim in the Age of AI Contents Emacs and Vim in the Age of AI It’s tough to make predictions, especially about the future. – Yogi Berra I’ve been an Emacs fanatic for over 20 years. I’ve built and maintained some of the most popular Emacs packages, contributed to Emacs itself, and spent countless hours tweaking my configuration. Emacs isn’t just my editor – it’s my passion, and my happy place. Over the past year, I’ve also been spending a lot of time with Vim and Neovim, relearning them from scratch and having a blast contrasting how the two communities approach similar problems. It’s been a fun and refreshing experience. 1 And lately, like everyone else in our industry, I’ve been playing with AI tools – Claude Code in particular – watching the impact of AI on the broader programming landscape, and pondering what it all means for the future of programming. Naturally, I keep coming back to the same question: what happens to my beloved Emacs and its “arch nemesis” Vim in this brave new world? I think the answer is more nuanced than either “they’re doomed” or “nothing changes”. Predicting the future is obviously hard work, but it’s so fun to speculate on it. My reasoning is that every major industry shift presents plenty of risks and opportunities for those involved in it, so I want to spend a bit of time ruminating over the risks and opportunities for Emacs and Vim. The Risks The only thing that is constant is change. – Heraclitus Every major technological disruption presents both challenges and opportunities. Things are never simply black and white – just some shade of gray. The AI revolution is no different, and I think it’s worth examining both sides honestly before drawing any conclusions. Let’s start with the challenges. The IDE gravity well VS Code is already the dominant editor by a wide margin, and it’s going to get first-class integrations with every major AI tool – Copilot (obviously), Codex, Claude, Gemini, you name it. Microsoft has every incentive to make VS Code the best possible host for AI-assisted development, and the resources to do it. On top of that, purpose-built AI editors like Cursor , Windsurf , and others are attracting serious investment and talent. These aren’t adding AI to an existing editor as an afterthought – they’re building the entire experience around AI workflows. They offer integrated context management, inline diffs, multi-file editing, and agent loops that feel native rather than bolted on. Every developer who switches to one of these tools is a developer who isn’t learning Emacs or Vim keybindings, isn’t writing Elisp, and isn’t contributing to our ecosystems. The gravity well is real. I never tried Cursor and Windsurf simply because they are essentially forks of VS Code and I can’t stand VS Code. I tried it several times over the years and I never felt productive in it for a variety of reasons. Do you even need a “power tool” anymore? Part of the case for Emac
title_zh: Emacs与Vim在人工智能时代的演进
summary_zh: 在AI时代，Emacs与Vim将何去何从？一位拥有20多年经验的Emacs狂热爱好者，同时也是多个流行Emacs包的构建者，近期重新探索了Vim和Neovim，并深入思考了AI工具（特别是Claude Code）对编程未来的影响。他认为，AI革命既带来风险也创造机遇，未来并非简单的“它们注定消亡”或“一切照旧”。，主要风险在于IDE的“引力井”效应。VS Code已占据主导地位，并将优先集成各类主流AI工具（如Copilot、Codex、Claude、Gemini等）。微软有充分动机和资源将VS Code打造成AI辅助开发的最佳平台。此外，Cursor、Windsurf等专为AI设计的编辑器正吸引大量投资和人才。这些编辑器并非简单地在现有工具上添加AI功能，而是围绕AI工作流重构整个体验，提供集成的上下文管理、内联差异对比、多文件编辑和原生感强的智能体循环。开发者若转向这些工具，便可能不再学习Emacs或Vim的键位绑定、编写Elisp或为传统编辑器生态做贡献。，另一个核心问题是：在AI辅助编程日益强大的背景下，开发者是否还需要Emacs或Vim这样的“强力工具”？传统编辑器的优势在于高度可定制性和对工作流的深度控制，但AI工具正逐步自动化许多原本需要手动优化或复杂配置的任务。这可能导致部分用户转向更“傻瓜式”的集成开发环境。，然而，机遇同样存在。Emacs和Vim社区可积极整合AI能力，例如通过API接入大型语言模型（LLM），开发智能插件，或利用RAG（检索增强生成）技术增强代码补全和文档查询。这些编辑器的高度可扩展性为其适应AI时代提供了基础。未来，它们或许能演变为AI驱动的个性化编程环境，平衡自动化与用户控制权。，总之，AI不会直接淘汰Emacs和Vim，但可能改变其使用场景和用户群体。它们的未来取决于社区如何拥抱AI变革，将传统优势与智能工具相结合，在自动化浪潮中保持独特价值。

title: Elon Musk pushes out more xAI founders as AI coding effort falters
title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克在AI编码项目受挫之际将更多xAI创始人排挤出局
summary_zh: 埃隆·马斯克在xAI公司内部推动更多创始人离职，其AI编码项目的进展面临挑战。据报道，随着xAI在开发自主编码AI系统方面的努力遇到困难，马斯克正进一步调整团队架构，导致包括部分联合创始人在内的高层人员变动。，xAI是马斯克旗下专注于人工智能研发的公司，旨在创建能与OpenAI的GPT系列等模型竞争的先进AI系统。其核心项目之一是开发能够理解、生成和调试代码的AI编码助手，这被视为提升软件开发效率的关键方向。然而，该项目在技术实现或战略推进上似乎未能达到预期进度，引发了内部调整。，此次人员变动涉及多位早期参与创立xAI的关键成员。有分析指出，这可能是马斯克为了加速技术突破、重塑团队方向或整合资源而采取的措施。在AI领域竞争日益激烈的背景下，特别是面对像GPT-4、Claude等大型语言模型（LLM）在代码生成方面的快速进步，xAI需要更高效的执行力和明确的技术路线来保持竞争力。，项目的具体技术细节尚未完全公开，但通常此类AI编码系统会结合大型语言模型、检索增强生成（RAG）技术以及针对代码库的专门训练。其价值在于能够辅助甚至自动化部分编程任务，降低开发门槛，提高软件质量与开发速度。此次团队动荡可能反映出在模型能力、训练数据、产品化路径或与马斯克其他公司（如特斯拉、X平台）的协同方面存在挑战。，总体而言，这一变动凸显了尖端AI研发的高风险与高强度特性。尽管面临内部重组，xAI在马斯克的推动下，预计仍将继续致力于开发具有竞争力的AI工具，但其AI编码项目的短期前景因此蒙上不确定性。业界将密切关注其后续的技术发布、人才招募以及可能的战略合作动向。

title: Show HN: Context Gateway – Compress agent context before it hits the LLM
content: GitHub - Compresr-ai/Context-Gateway: Context Gateway is an agentic proxy that enhances any AI agent workflow with instant history compaction and context optimization tools · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Context Gateway sits between your AI agent (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) and the LLM API. When your conversation gets too long, it compresses history in the background so you never wait for compaction. Quick Start # Install gateway binary curl -fsSL https://compresr.ai/api/install | sh # Then select an agent (opens interactive TUI wizard) context-gateway The TUI wizard will help you: Choose an agent (claude_code, cursor, openclaw, or custom) Create/edit configuration: Summarizer model and api key enable slack notifications if needed Set trigger threshold for compression (default: 75%) Supported agents: claude_code : Claude Code IDE integration cursor : Cursor IDE integration openclaw : Open-source Claude Code alternative custom : Bring your own agent configuration What you'll notice No more waiting when conversation hits context limits Compaction happens instantly (summary was pre-computed in background) Check logs/history_compaction.jsonl to see what's happening Contributing We welcome contributions! Please join our Discord to contribute. title_zh: Show HN：Context Gateway——在信息抵达大语言模型前压缩代理上下文
summary_zh: Context Gateway 是一款由 YC 支持的 Compresr 公司开发的代理工具，旨在为 AI 智能体工作流提供即时历史压缩和上下文优化功能。该项目作为一个代理服务器，部署在用户的 AI 智能体（如 Claude Code、Cursor 等）与 LLM API 之间，核心目标是解决长对话场景下的上下文窗口限制问题。，其核心功能是背景式的即时历史压缩。当对话长度达到预设的触发阈值（默认为上下文窗口的 75%）时，系统会自动在后台对较早的对话历史进行压缩（例如生成摘要），而无需用户等待压缩过程完成，从而确保对话流畅不间断。用户可以通过检查日志文件 `history_compaction.jsonl` 来了解压缩的具体情况。，项目支持多种 AI 智能体，包括 Claude Code IDE 集成、Cursor IDE 集成、开源替代方案 OpenClaw，以及允许用户自定义配置的“custom”选项。快速启动过程简便，通过命令行安装 `gateway` 二进制文件后，运行 `context-gateway` 命令会启动一个交互式的 TUI 向导，引导用户完成配置：选择智能体类型、设置用于摘要的模型和 API 密钥、配置 Slack 通知（可选），以及调整触发压缩的阈值。，该工具的价值在于无缝优化 LLM 的上下文使用，通过预计算摘要来避免因触及上下文限制而导致的等待或中断，提升了 AI 编码助手等智能体在长周期、复杂任务中的连续性和效率。项目已在 GitHub 开源，采用 Apache-2.0 许可证，并设有 Discord 社区以欢迎贡献者参与。

title: Launch HN: Spine Swarm (YC S23) – AI agents that collaborate on a visual canvas
content: Spine Swarm | Building the future of human-AI collaboration
title_zh: Launch HN：Spine Swarm（YC S23）——在可视化画布上协作的AI智能体
summary_zh: Spine Swarm（YC S23）是一个旨在构建人机协作未来的平台，其核心是让AI智能体（AI agents）能够在可视化画布上协同工作。该项目近日在Hacker News上启动，展示了其独特的工作方式与潜在应用价值。，该平台的核心功能是提供一个共享的视觉工作空间，多个AI智能体可以在此环境中同时操作、交流并共同完成任务。用户可以通过自然语言指令或直接交互来引导这些智能体，它们能够理解上下文、执行具体操作（如编辑内容、移动元素、分析数据），并相互协调以达成复杂目标。这种设计模仿了人类团队在物理白板或数字看板上的协作模式，但全部由AI驱动。，技术细节上，Spine Swarm 利用了先进的LLM（大语言模型）作为智能体的基础，并结合了实时协作框架与可视化引擎。智能体具备一定自主性，能根据画布上的视觉元素和用户指令做出决策。平台可能整合了类似RAG（检索增强生成）的技术来访问外部知识，或通过API连接其他工具（如GitHub、设计软件等），以扩展能力。其架构支持“群”（Swarm）的协同机制，即多个智能体可以分工合作，处理一个大型任务的不同部分。，该项目的关键特点与价值在于：它试图超越当前常见的单轮对话式AI（如ChatGPT、Claude），实现多智能体在持久、动态的视觉环境中的复杂协作。这为创意构思、项目规划、设计原型、数据分析等需要多步骤、多视角的任务提供了新的解决方案。通过降低人机交互的摩擦，并将AI能力嵌入到直观的视觉界面中，Spine Swarm 旨在提升团队生产力和创造力，探索人机共生的新范式。

title_zh: 约翰·卡马克谈开源与反AI活动人士
summary_zh: 约翰·卡马克谈开源与反AI活动人士，著名程序员、游戏开发先驱约翰·卡马克近日就开源软件与反AI活动人士的争议发表了看法。卡马克以其在id Software开发《毁灭战士》、《雷神之锤》等游戏中的开创性工作而闻名，长期以来一直是开源软件的坚定倡导者。，卡马克指出，开源运动的核心精神在于协作、透明和知识的自由共享，这与当前AI技术，特别是大型语言模型（LLM）的发展存在深刻的协同潜力。他认为，开源方法论能够促进AI技术的审计、改进和普及，防止技术被少数实体垄断。，针对日益活跃的反AI活动人士，卡马克表达了谨慎的理解但明确的反对。他承认AI技术（如GPT、Claude等模型）的快速发展引发了关于就业、隐私和伦理的合理担忧，但他认为全面抵制AI是短视且徒劳的。卡马克强调，技术发展的轨迹难以阻挡，更建设性的路径是积极参与塑造其未来，确保其向善发展。他主张通过开源AI模型、公开数据集和透明的研究过程来应对AI的风险，而不是试图阻止其进步。，卡马克特别提到了检索增强生成（RAG）等技术，认为它们是将AI系统与可控知识库结合的有效途径，可以提升输出的准确性和可靠性。他鼓励开发者在GitHub等平台上共享代码、工具和最佳实践，通过开放的API促进生态创新。，总体而言，卡马克的立场是技术乐观主义与务实责任的结合。他呼吁社区拥抱开源理念来引导AI发展，通过开放协作解决伦理问题，并批评了那种试图通过阻止技术进步来解决社会问题的做法。他认为，未来的关键在于如何构建和治理这些强大的工具，而非是否应该拥有它们。

title: anthropics/claude-plugins-official - Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.

Anthropic does not control what MCP servers, files, or other software are included in plugins and cannot verify that they will work as intended or that they won't change. See each plugin's homepage for more information. Structure /plugins - Internal plugins developed and maintained by Anthropic /external_plugins - Third-party plugins from partners and the community Installation Plugins can be installed directly from this marketplace via Claude Code's plugin system. To install, run /plugin install {plugin-name}@claude-plugin-directory or browse for the plugin in /plugin > Discover Contributing Internal Plugins Internal plugins are developed by Anthropic team members. See /plugins/example-plugin for a reference implementation. External Plugins Third-party partners can submit plugins for inclusion in the marketplace. External plugins must meet quality and security standards for approval. To submit a new plugin, use the plugin directory submission form . Plugin Structure Each plugin follows a standard structure: plugin-name/ ├── .claude-plugin/ │ └── plugin.json # Plugin metadata (required) ├── .mcp.json # MCP server configuration (optional) ├── commands/ # Slash commands (optional) ├── agents/ # Agent definitions (optional) ├── skills/ # Skill definitions (optional) └── README.md # Documentation License Please see each linked plugin for the relevant LICENSE file. Documentation For more information on developing Claude Code plugins, see the official documentation . title_zh: Anthropic/Claude插件官方 - 由Anthropic管理的高质量Claude代码插件官方目录。
summary_zh: Anthropic在GitHub上正式推出了官方管理的Claude Code插件目录（anthropics/claude-plugins-official）。该项目是一个经过精心筛选的高质量Claude Code插件集合，旨在为用户提供一个可靠、集中的插件发现和安装平台。，该目录包含两个主要部分：由Anthropic内部团队开发和维护的“/plugins”目录，以及来自合作伙伴和社区的第三方“/external_plugins”目录。所有插件都遵循统一的结构标准，核心配置文件包括“.claude-plugin/plugin.json”（必需的插件元数据）和可选的“.mcp.json”（MCP服务器配置）。插件还可以包含commands（斜杠命令）、agents（代理定义）和skills（技能定义）等模块。，用户可以直接通过Claude Code的插件系统从该市场安装插件。安装方式有两种：在聊天界面运行“/plugin install {插件名称}@claude-plugin-directory”命令，或通过“/plugin > Discover”菜单浏览并选择。，Anthropic特别强调了安全注意事项，提醒用户在安装、更新或使用任何插件前务必确认其可信度。由于Anthropic并不控制插件内包含的MCP服务器、文件或其他软件，也无法验证其功能是否符合预期或是否会发生变更，因此用户需要自行参考每个插件主页的详细信息进行评估。，对于开发者，Anthropic提供了贡献指南。内部插件由Anthropic团队成员开发，项目内提供了“/plugins/example-plugin”作为参考实现。第三方合作伙伴则可以提交插件申请纳入市场，但必须满足一定的质量和安全标准才能获得批准，提交需通过专门的插件目录提交表单进行。，该项目目前获得了极高的社区关注，在GitHub上已拥有1.1万个star和1.1k个fork。更多关于开发Claude Code插件的详细信息，可参阅官方文档。

Users can upload, process, and query documents through a chat interface backed by large language models and semantic search capabilities. The system utilizes Langflow for document ingestion, retrieval workflows, and intelligent nudges, providing a seamless RAG experience. Check out the documentation or get started with the quickstart . Built with FastAPI and Next.js . Powered by OpenSearch , Langflow , and Docling . ✨ Highlight Features Pre-packaged & ready to run - All core tools are hooked up and ready to go, just install and run Agentic RAG workflows - Advanced orchestration with re-ranking and multi-agent coordination Document ingestion - Handles messy, real-world data with intelligent parsing Drag-and-drop workflow builder - Visual interface powered by Langflow for rapid iteration Modular enterprise add-ons - Extend functionality when you need it Enterprise search at any scale - Powered by OpenSearch for production-grade performance 🔄 How OpenRAG Works OpenRAG follows a streamlined workflow to transform your documents into intelligent, searchable k
title_zh: langflow-ai/openrag - OpenRAG是一个基于Langflow、Docling和Opensearch构建的综合性单包检索增强生成平台。
summary_zh: langflow-ai/openrag项目推出了OpenRAG，这是一个基于Langflow、Docling和OpenSearch构建的综合性、一体化检索增强生成平台。该平台旨在实现智能文档搜索和AI驱动的对话，用户可以通过由大语言模型和语义搜索能力支持的聊天界面上传、处理和查询文档。，OpenRAG的核心功能与特点包括：它是一个开箱即用的单包解决方案，所有核心工具均已集成，安装后即可运行。平台采用智能体驱动的RAG工作流，具备高级编排能力，支持结果重排序和多智能体协调。在文档处理方面，它能通过智能解析处理混乱的真实世界数据。其可视化工作流构建器基于Langflow，支持拖拽操作，便于快速迭代。平台采用模块化设计，可根据需要扩展企业级附加功能。后端由OpenSearch驱动，能够提供生产级性能，支持任何规模的企业级搜索。，系统的工作流程经过优化，能够将文档转化为可智能搜索的知识库。它利用Langflow进行文档摄取、检索工作流管理和智能提示，从而提供无缝的RAG体验。整个系统基于FastAPI和Next.js构建，底层由OpenSearch、Langflow和Docling提供技术支持。

title: lightpanda-io/browser - Lightpanda: the headless browser designed for AI and automation
content: GitHub - lightpanda-io/browser: Lightpanda: the headless browser designed for AI and automation · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert lightpanda-io / browser Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 600 Star 16.4k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 4,869 Commits 4,869 Commits .github .github src src .gitignore .gitignore CLA.md CLA.md CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md Dockerfile Dockerfile LICENSE LICENSE LICENSING.md LICENSING.md Makefile Makefile README.md README.md build.zig build.zig build.zig.zon build.zig.zon flake.lock flake.lock flake.nix flake.nix View all files Repository files navigation Lightpanda Browser lightpanda.io Lightpanda is the open-source browser made for headless usage: Javascript execution Support of Web APIs (partial, WIP) Compatible with Playwright 1 , Puppeteer, chromedp through CDP Fast web automation for AI agents, LLM training, scraping and testing: Ultra-low memory footprint (9x less than Chrome) Exceptionally fast execution (11x faster than Chrome) Instant startup Puppeteer requesting 100 pages from a local website on a AWS EC2 m5.large instance. See benchmark details . Quick start Install Install from the nightly builds You can download the last binary from the nightly builds for Linux x86_64 and MacOS aarch64. For Linux curl -L -o lightpanda https://github.com/lightpanda-io/browser/releases/download/nightly/lightpanda-x86_64-linux && \ chmod a+x ./lightpanda For MacOS curl -L -o lightpanda https://github.com/lightpanda-io/browser/releases/download/nightly/lightpanda-aarch64-macos && \ chmod a+x ./lightpanda For Windows + WSL2 The Lightpanda browser is compatible to run on windows inside WSL. Follow the Linux instruction for installation from a WSL terminal. It is recommended to install clients like Puppeteer on the Windows host. Install from Docker Lightpanda provides official Docker images for both Linux amd64 and arm64 architectures. The following command fetches the Docker image and starts a new container exposing Lightpanda's CDP server on port 9222 . docker run -d --name lightpanda -p 9222:9222 lightpanda/browser:nightly Dump a URL ./lightpanda fetch --obey_robots --log_format pretty --log_level info https://demo-browser.lightpanda.io/campfire-commerce/ INFO telemetry : telemetry status . . . . . . . . . . . . . [+0ms] disabled = false INFO page : navigate . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . [+6ms] url = https://demo-browser.lightpanda.io/campfire-commerce/ method = GET reason = address_bar body = false req_id = 1 INFO browser : executing script . . . . . . . . . . . . . . [+118ms] src = https://demo-browser.lightpanda.io/campfire-comme
title_zh: lightpanda-io/browser - Lightpanda：专为AI和自动化设计的无头浏览器
summary_zh: Lightpanda是一款专为AI和自动化设计的开源无头浏览器，旨在为AI智能体、LLM训练、网页抓取和测试提供高效的Web自动化解决方案。该项目在GitHub上开源，核心优势在于其卓越的性能表现：内存占用比Chrome低9倍，执行速度快11倍，并能实现即时启动。它支持JavaScript执行和部分Web API（持续完善中），并通过Chrome DevTools Protocol与主流自动化工具兼容，包括Playwright、Puppeteer和chromedp。，项目提供了便捷的安装方式，用户可从夜间构建版本下载适用于Linux x86_64和macOS aarch64的二进制文件，也支持通过Docker镜像快速部署。Docker镜像会启动一个容器，在端口9222上暴露CDP服务器。此外，Lightpanda还能在Windows的WSL2环境中运行。，其核心功能可通过命令行直接使用，例如使用`fetch`命令获取并输出指定URL的页面内容，过程中可配置是否遵守robots协议、日志格式和级别等选项。该浏览器特别优化了资源消耗与速度，在基准测试中（如在AWS EC2 m5.large实例上使用Puppeteer请求100个本地页面），展现出显著优势，使其成为大规模自动化任务和AI驱动工作流的理想底层工具。

title: msitarzewski/agency-agents - A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
content: GitHub - msitarzewski/agency-agents: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert msitarzewski / agency-agents Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 6.3k Star 42.1k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 183 Commits 183 Commits .github .github design design engineering engineering examples examples game-development game-development integrations integrations marketing marketing paid-media paid-media product product project-management project-management sales sales scripts scripts spatial-computing spatial-computing specialized specialized strategy strategy support support testing testing .gitattributes .gitattributes .gitignore .gitignore CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md View all files Repository files navigation 🎭 The Agency: AI Specialists Ready to Transform Your Workflow A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables. 🚀 What Is This? Born from a Reddit thread and months of iteration, The Agency is a growing collection of meticulously crafted AI agent personalities. Each agent is: 🎯 Specialized : Deep expertise in their domain (not generic prompt templates) 🧠 Personality-Driven : Unique voice, communication style, and approach 📋 Deliverable-Focused : Real code, processes, and measurable outcomes ✅ Production-Ready : Battle-tested workflows and success metrics Think of it as : Assembling your dream team, except they're AI specialists who never sleep, never complain, and always deliver. ⚡ Quick Start Option 1: Use with Claude Code (Recommended) # Copy agents to your Claude Code directory cp -r agency-agents/ * ~ /.claude/agents/ # Now activate any agent in your Claude Code sessions: # "Hey Claude, activate Frontend Developer mode and help me build a React component" Option 2: Use as Reference Each agent file contains: Identity & personality traits Core mission & workflows Technical deliverables with code examples Success metrics & communication style Browse the agents below and copy/adapt the ones you need! Option 3: Use with Other Tools (Cursor, Aider, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, OpenCode) # Step 1 -- generate integration files for all supported tools ./scripts/convert.sh # Step 2 -- install interactively (auto-detects what you have installed) ./scripts/install.sh
title_zh: msitarzewski/agency-agents - 触手可及的完整AI代理机构 - 从前端魔法师到Reddit社区忍者，从奇思妙想注入者到现实检验员。每个代理都是具备个性、流程和已验证交付成果的专业专家。
summary_zh: GitHub项目“msitarzewski/agency-agents”提供了一个完整的AI代理集合，旨在将专业的人工智能助手团队置于用户指尖。该项目源自Reddit社区的讨论和数月的迭代，现已发展成一个精心设计的AI智能体角色库。每个代理都扮演特定领域的专家角色，覆盖范围广泛，从前端开发向导、Reddit社区运营专家，到创意激发者和现实核查员。，该项目的核心在于每个代理都具备高度专业化、鲜明的个性以及经过验证的交付能力。它们并非通用的提示模板，而是深度专注于各自领域，拥有独特的沟通风格和工作方法。每个代理都专注于产出实际可交付的成果，例如真实的代码、可执行的流程和可衡量的结果，并且其工作流程和成功指标都经过实战检验，处于生产就绪状态。，用户可以通过多种方式快速使用这些代理。推荐的方式是与Claude Code集成：用户只需将代理文件复制到Claude Code目录，即可在会话中激活特定代理模式，例如指示Claude“激活前端开发者模式”来协助构建React组件。此外，用户也可以将代理文件作为参考，每个文件都详细描述了代理的身份个性、核心使命、工作流程、包含代码示例的技术交付物以及成功指标。项目还提供了脚本，支持与其他开发工具（如Cursor、Aider、Windsurf、Gemini CLI、OpenCode）集成，通过转换和安装脚本实现一键部署。，总之，该项目如同一个永不疲倦、从不抱怨且始终高效交付的AI专家梦之队，旨在彻底改变用户的工作流程，为开发、营销、产品管理、测试等多个专业领域提供即插即用的专业化AI辅助。

title: AI“追赶者”遇阻：扎克伯格推迟新模型，马斯克“从零”重组xAI
title_zh: AI“追赶者”遇阻：扎克伯格推迟新模型，马斯克“从零”重组xAI

title: AI Website Redesign by Shuffle
summary_zh: 是一款由AI驱动的网站重新设计工具，旨在快速、高效地重塑网站外观与用户体验。该工具利用先进的AI技术，允许用户通过简单的文本提示或URL输入，即可在几分钟内生成全新的、专业级的网站设计方案。，其核心功能在于能够理解用户的设计意图，并自动应用现代网页设计原则。用户只需描述他们想要的风格（如“简约”、“科技感”或“活泼”），或直接提供一个现有网站URL作为参考，AI便会分析内容结构、品牌元素和设计趋势，生成包含布局、配色方案、字体和图像建议的完整视觉改版方案。该过程大大减少了传统网站重新设计所需的时间、成本和专业知识门槛。，该工具的一个关键特点是其“Shuffle”机制，即能够基于初始输入快速生成多个设计变体供用户选择和迭代，从而实现快速创意探索。它整合了最新的LLM（大语言模型）和计算机视觉技术，以理解文本和视觉上下文。此外，它可能支持与Figma等流行设计工具的集成，方便设计师进一步细化。，对于企业主、营销人员和网页开发者而言，其核心价值在于显著提升网站改版项目的启动速度和灵感来源，将耗时数周的设计探索过程压缩至数小时。它并非完全替代设计师，而是作为一个强大的创意副驾驶（co-pilot），处理基础性、重复性的设计任务，让人类专家能更专注于战略与细节优化。这项技术代表了AI在创意和设计自动化领域应用的最新进展。
